description_long: This helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic design with a gold base color and a prominent black stripe running from the front to the back. The front is dominated by a large, dark-tinted visor that covers the entire face area, providing full-face protection. On both sides, the helmet displays the UCF Knights logo, with one side showing a cartoon knight mascot and the other the official UCF Knights text and sword emblem. The word 'Knights' is elegantly scripted along the lower side, and the surface shows intentional scuff marks and wear, giving it a rugged, used appearance. The helmet's overall shape is angular and modern, with no visible vents or external attachments.
description: A gold helmet with a black central stripe, full-face dark visor, and UCF Knights logos and script on the sides, featuring a rugged, worn look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black visor covering the face area and the central black stripe running vertically.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the UCF knight mascot logo and the 'Knights' script, with visible scuff marks.
description_view_2: Top view emphasizes the black stripe running the length of the helmet and the worn texture.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the official UCF Knights logo and the continuation of the 'Knights' script.
attribute_brand_logo: The helmet features the UCF Knights logo on both sides: one side has a cartoon knight mascot with 'UCF' text, and the other side has the official UCF Knights logo with a sword, both in white and black.
attribute_graphic_design: Gold base with a black central stripe, UCF Knights logos on both sides, 'Knights' script, and intentional scuff marks for a rugged look.
